rationale: Add a small procedural config to prefer short argument passing to reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk without touching code.

edits.content: {"prefer_short_args":true,"max_arg_chars":6000,"notes":"Keep CLI arguments short; use files/paths instead of long inline JSON."}

risks: None; adds a new procedural hint file only.
expected_benefit: Reduces likelihood of Windows command-line length issues while keeping behavior opt-in.
